backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the chat application backend with user management, messaging, and conversation logic, including access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two tasks: fixing the 'connection not ready' registration error in RegistrationScreen.tsx and auditing actor readiness guards in useQueries.ts.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using Tailwind's base layer, covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Xeta' that mounts the React app via a root div and loads main.tsx as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling authentication state, profile loading with timeout, tab/screen navigation, and periodic last-seen updates for the Xeta chat app.
frontend/src/components/BluetoothPairing: Empty file placeholder for the BluetoothPairing component.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Bottom tab bar component rendering four navigation tabs (Chats, Updates, Calls, Settings) with active state styling using xeta-green color tokens.
frontend/src/components/CallsScreen.tsx: Displays a call history screen showing past voice/video calls with contact name, direction, duration, and relative timestamps. Reads call history from local storage via `readCallHistory` and renders an empty state when no calls exist.
frontend/src/components/ChatListScreen.t: Renders the main chat list with a searchable conversation list and user search to start new one-on-one chats. Supports sorting conversations by last message time and creating new conversations via a FAB menu.
frontend/src/components/ChatScreen.tsx: Full chat screen component that displays messages for a conversation, supports sending text and file/image messages, and includes voice/video call overlays. Handles auto-scrolling, message delivery marking, and resolves conversation participants from props or fetched data.
frontend/src/components/ContactsList.tsx: Provides a contact search screen where users can look up others by username/ID to start a new chat. Displays search results with avatar and presence indicator, excluding the current user.
frontend/src/components/CreateGroupScree: Two-step group creation screen: first select participants via username search, then enter a group name before creating the group chat. Uses `useCreateGroupChat` mutation and validates inputs before submission.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Renders an individual chat message bubble with support for text, image, and file message types. Displays sender name for group chats, message timestamp, and delivery receipt icon for sent messages.
frontend/src/components/PresenceIndicato: Renders a presence status indicator with an optional colored dot and text showing whether a user is online or when they were last seen.
frontend/src/components/ProfileScreen.ts: Displays and allows editing of the current user's profile (display name, status message) with theme toggle and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/ReceiptIcon.tsx: Renders SVG message receipt icons (single check, double check, or blue double check) based on a MessageStatus enum value.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationScre: Provides a registration form for new users to choose a username and display name, with validation and error handling before calling the createUser mutation.
frontend/src/components/UpdatesScreen.ts: Placeholder screen for a Status & Stories feature that displays a coming-soon message under the Updates tab.
frontend/src/components/UserAvatar.tsx: Renders a user avatar as either an image or a colored initials circle, with consistent hue generation based on the display name.
frontend/src/components/VideoCallOverlay: Full-screen video call UI overlay that accesses the device camera/microphone, shows a local PiP video feed, tracks call duration, and logs call history on end.
frontend/src/components/VoiceCallOverlay: Full-screen voice call UI overlay that accesses the device microphone, tracks call duration, supports mute toggle, and logs call history on end.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend interactions including fetching/creating/updating user profiles, managing messages, conversations, and media files via the canister actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom hook that manages dark/light theme state with localStorage persistence, applying the theme class to the document root and exposing a toggle function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for dark and light themes using OKLCH colors, Tailwind base/component/utility layers, custom scrollbar styles, and message bubble helpers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/types/calls.ts: Defines TypeScript types for call history entries and provides localStorage utility functions to read, write, and append call history records.
frontend/src/types/web-bluetooth.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file, likely a placeholder for Web Bluetooth API type augmentations.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting timestamps as relative time strings, presence/online status, user initials, message times, and chat list times.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and hash parameter cleanup.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH CSS variable-based colors, custom Xeta design tokens, typography fonts, border radii, box shadows, and required plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 31) for 'Xeta', a WhatsApp-like messaging app, including architectural notes, known issues (registration/sign-in failures), and a list of existing and planned features.
